measures.title: Maintenance and Enhancement of Public Transportation Services
measures.what_it_does: Reauthorizes an existing voter-approved sales and use tax for public transportation services, transit system maintenance and enhancement, expansion, and support facilities.
measures.cost_line: Reauthorizes up to 0.2% sales and use tax from January 1, 2029 through no later than December 31, 2048.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or fee measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Regular Library Operations and Maintenance Levy
measures.what_it_does: Restores the library district's regular property tax levy rate to support library operations, maintenance, services, materials, staffing, and facilities.
measures.cost_line: Restores the levy rate to $0.45 per $1,000 of assessed value for collection in 2027.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or fee measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Spokane County West Plains Aquifer Protection Area
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes monthly fees to fund aquifer protection activities including planning, water quality improvements, sewage and stormwater facilities, monitoring, inspections, and public education.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes monthly fees up to $1.25 per household unit for water withdrawal and $1.25 for on-site sewage disposal for up to 20 years.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or fee measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Renewal of Residential Street Utility Tax
measures.what_it_does: Renews Cheney's tax on electrical energy and natural gas businesses to 16.75% of gross revenue for 14 years, with proceeds used to repair streets and sidewalks.
measures.cost_line: Renews a utility tax rate six percentage points above the otherwise authorized 10.75% rate for 14 years.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or fee measure for the listed public service.
